text: I feel quietly alert, my senses heightened by the artificial light and vivid colors. The glass barrier before me makes the scene feel both open and separated, as if I am observing a space designed for creativity and reflection but also partially withheld behind transparent walls. There’s a sense of anticipation here—a feeling that something important is being studied or developed just out of full reach. I am curious, intellectually engaged, but also a little detached, conscious of the boundaries that define this environment.
